name: remote-codex-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Remote Codex web and API server.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n remote-codex-agent,remote-codex-web,relay-api,relay-web -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/remote-codex-agent" "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/remote-codex-web" "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/relay-api" "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/relay-web"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n remote-codex-agent,remote-codex-web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/remote-codex-agent" "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/remote-codex-web"
scripts.dev:relay: concurrently -n relay-api,relay-web -c magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/relay-api" "npm run dev -w @remote-codex/relay-web"
